description: Import the regional topographic dataset from 'C:\workspace\data\regional_topo.xyz' (space-delimited, format: PointNumber X Y Z). Define a 300m x 300m rectangular project boundary using the following coordinates: NW (5000.00, 5200.00), NE (5300.00, 5200.00), SE (5300.00, 4900.00), and SW (5000.00, 4900.00). Delete all survey points located outside this boundary. Export the remaining interior points to 'C:\workspace\data\site_aoi_points.xyz' and save the project to 'C:\workspace\data\site_aoi.tcp'.
